title: Regional variability of the impact of cardiometabolic diseases on incident dementia in United States Medicare beneficiaries
authors: George K. Karway; Brittany Krzyzanowski; Jordan A. Killion; Irene M. Faust; Osvaldo J. Laurido‐Soto; Marwan N. Sabbagh; Brad A. Racette
abstract: Understanding the impact of cardiometabolic diseases (CMDs) on dementia risk can inform primary preventative measures.
